sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ رَئِيسَا الدَّوْلَتَيْنِ اليَوْمَ لِمُنَاقَشَةِ العَلَاقَاتِ الثُّنَائِيَّةِ بَيْنَهُمَا.
sentences.translation: Predsjednici dvije države sastali su se danas kako bi razgovarali o bilateralnim odnosima.
sentences.translationEn: The presidents of the two countries met today to discuss bilateral relations.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ مَوَاضِيعَ التِّجَارَةِ وَالأَمْنِ فِي المِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sastanak se bavio temama trgovine i sigurnosti u regionu.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting addressed topics of trade and security in the region.

sentences.arabic: اتَّفَقَ الطَّرَفَانِ عَلَى تَوْقِيعِ اتِّفَاقِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلتَّعَاوُنِ الِاقْتِصَادِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Dvije strane su se dogovorile o potpisivanju novog sporazuma o ekonomskoj saradnji.
sentences.translationEn: Both sides agreed to sign a new agreement for economic cooperation.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ وَسَائِلُ الإِعْلَامِ إِنَّ اللِّقَاءَ كَانَ إِيجَابِيًّا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Mediji su prenijeli da je susret bio veoma pozitivan.
sentences.translationEn: The media said that the meeting was very positive.

sentences.arabic: سَيَزُورُ الرَّئِيسُ الآخَرُ العَاصِمَةَ فِي نِهَايَةِ السَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Drugi predsjednik će posjetiti glavni grad krajem godine.
sentences.translationEn: The other president will visit the capital at the end of the year.
